name: Outreach: AI Draft

description.en: Draft a personalized outreach message for a contact. Fetches the contact's profile and recent activity history, then uses AI to write a context-aware message tailored to the chosen occasion. Returns the draft for human review — does not send.
description.de: Entwirf eine personalisierte Outreach-Nachricht für einen Kontakt. Lädt das Profil und die letzten Aktivitäten des Kontakts und schreibt mit KI eine kontextbezogene Nachricht zum gewählten Anlass. Gibt den Entwurf zur Freigabe zurück — sendet nicht.

bot: Use this when you want a personalized draft for a specific contact, anchored in their actual history with you. Inputs: contactId, occasion (e.g. 'check-in', 'follow-up', 'congratulate', 'win-back'), and an optional context note. Output is text for the operator to review, edit, and send.

inputs.name: Contact
inputs.bot: The hashid of the CRM contact.

inputs.name: Occasion
inputs.bot: Examples: 'check-in', 'follow-up', 'congratulate', 'win-back', 'thank-you', 'intro-request'. Free-form is fine — the LLM uses it as guidance.

inputs.name: Context

description.en: Optional extra context (recent event, specific topic, etc.)
description.de: Optionaler zusätzlicher Kontext (aktuelles Ereignis, spezifisches Thema usw.)

inputs.bot: Optional. If you want the draft to reference something specific that isn't in the activity log yet — like a post you saw or news you heard — drop it here.

success.en: Draft ready — review and send manually.
success.de: Entwurf bereit — bitte prüfen und manuell senden.
